_meta._DRAFT: Auto-generated. Labels/types/sections inferred; REVIEW priorities, required flags, and cross-field logic (insurer letter refs, optional blocks, radio groups) by hand.

fields.label: Producer customer identifier
fields.help: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g., agency or brokerage)

fields.label: Producer full name
fields.help: The full name of the producer / agency

fields.label: Producer customer identifier
fields.help: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g., agency or brokerage)

fields.label: Producer customer identifier
fields.help: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g., agency or brokerage)

fields.label: Producer customer identifier
fields.help: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g., agency or brokerage)

fields.label: Producer customer identifier
fields.help: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g., agency or brokerage)

fields.label: Producer authorized representative signature
fields.help: Sign here: Accommodates the signature of the authorized representative (e.g., producer, agent, broker, etc.) of the company(ies) listed on the document.  This is required in most states

fields.label: Producer authorized representative full name
fields.help: The name of the authorized representative of the producer, agency and/or broker that signed the form

fields.label: Producer state license identifier
fields.help: The State License Number of the producer. As used here,  this is required in Florida

fields.label: Producer national identifier
fields.help: The National Producer Number (NPN) as defined in the National Insurance Producer Registry (NIPR).  Note: The NPN is not the same as the producer state license number

fields.label: Form completion date
fields.help: The date on which the form is completed

fields.label: Policy policy number identifier
fields.help: The identifier assigned by the insurer to the policy, or submission, being referenced exactly as it appears on the policy, including prefix and suffix symbols. If required for self-insurance, the self-insured license or contract number

fields.label: Policy effective date
fields.help: The effective date of the policy.  The date that the terms and conditions of the policy commence

fields.label: Policy status new indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the response expected from the company is a new issued policy

fields.label: Policy status renew indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the response expected from the company is a renewed policy

fields.label: Policy policy type umbrella indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the type of policy is umbrella

fields.label: Policy policy type excess indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the type of policy is excess

fields.label: Insurer full name
fields.help: The insurer's full legal company name(s) as found in the file copy of the policy.  Use the actual name of the company within the group to which the policy has been issued.  This is not the insurer's group name or trade name

fields.label: Insurer naiccode
fields.help: The identification code assigned to the insurer by the NAIC

fields.label: Named insured full name
fields.help: The named insured(s) as it / they will appear on the policy declarations page

fields.label: Named insured initials
fields.help: Initial here: The named insured's initials. As used here, applicable in Louisiana

fields.label: Named insured initials
fields.help: Initial here: The named insured's initials. As used here, applicable in Louisiana

fields.label: Named insured initials
fields.help: Initial here: The named insured's initials. As used here, applicable in New Hampshire

fields.label: Named insured initials
fields.help: Initial here: The named insured's initials. As used here, applicable in New Hampshire

fields.label: Named insured signature
fields.help: Sign here: Accommodates the signature of the applicant or named insured

fields.label: Named insured signature date
fields.help: The date the form was signed by the named insured

fields.label: Excess umbrella occurrence indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates "coverage trigger" is on an occurrence basis on an excess or umbrella liability policy

fields.label: Excess umbrella claims made indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the "coverage trigger" is on a claims-made basis on an excess or umbrella liability policy

fields.label: Excess umbrella voluntary indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if the excess is voluntary

fields.label: Excess umbrella transactiontype other indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the transaction type is other than those listed

fields.label: Excess umbrella transactiontype other description
fields.help: The description of the other transaction type

fields.label: Excess umbrella proposed retroactive date
fields.help: The retroactive date you are requesting for the policy being applied for. This is the proposed earliest date for which an occurrence could "trigger" coverage under a Claims Made policy

fields.label: Excess umbrella current retroactive date
fields.help: The current retroactive date should be shown if the Umbrella is over a Claims Made primary policy. If the current retroactive date is different from the proposed retroactive date, an explanation must be provided

fields.label: Excess umbrella umbrella each occurrence amount
fields.help: The excess umbrella liability each occurrence limit

fields.label: Excess umbrella other coverage limit amount
fields.help: The excess umbrella liability limit other coverage limit should be listed as a whole dollar amount, as found on the policy declarations page. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s)

fields.label: Excess umbrella other coverage description
fields.help: The description of other coverage (not the limit) on the excess umbrella liability policy. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s)

fields.label: Excess umbrella other coverage limit amount
fields.help: The excess umbrella liability limit other coverage limit should be listed as a whole dollar amount, as found on the policy declarations page. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s)

fields.label: Excess umbrella other coverage description
fields.help: The description of other coverage (not the limit) on the excess umbrella liability policy. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s)

fields.label: Excess umbrella umbrella deductible or retention amount
fields.help: The excess or umbrella liability deductible or retention amount

fields.label: Excess umbrella first dollar defence code
fields.help: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates that first dollar defense coverage is requested

fields.label: Excess umbrella employee benefits each employee limit amount
fields.help: The each employee limit for employee benefits coverage

fields.label: Excess umbrella employee benefits aggregate limit amount
fields.help: The aggregate limit for employee benefits coverage

fields.label: Excess umbrella employee benefits deductible or retention amount
fields.help: The retention amount for employee benefits coverage

fields.label: Excess umbrella employee benefits retroactive date
fields.help: The retroactive date for employee benefits coverage

fields.label: Excess umbrella employee benefits program name
fields.help: The full name of the benefit program

fields.label: Excess umbrella employers liability jones act indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the employee/self-insured is subject to the Jones Act

fields.label: Excess umbrella employers liability felaindicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the employee/self-insured is subject to the Federal Employers Liability Act

fields.label: Excess umbrella employers liability stop gap indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the employee/self-insured is subject to Stop Gap

fields.label: Excess umbrella employers liability other indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the employee/self-insured is subject to regulations not listed

fields.label: Excess umbrella employers liability other description
fields.help: The description of the regulations the employee/self-insured is subject to

fields.label: Excess umbrella malpractice liability doctor count
fields.help: The number of doctors

fields.label: Excess umbrella malpractice liability nurse count
fields.help: The number of nurses

fields.label: Excess umbrella malpractice liability bed count
fields.help: The number of beds/bunks

fields.label: Excess umbrella pollution liability insured environmental protection agency identifier
fields.help: The number assigned to the insured by the Environmental Protection Agency

fields.label: Excess umbrella pollution liability general liability with pollution exclusion indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the insured carries a general liability policy with standard Insurance Services Office pollution exclusion coverage

fields.label: Excess umbrella pollution liability general liability sudden and accidental only indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the insured carries a general liability policy with standard sudden and accidental only coverage

fields.label: Excess umbrella pollution liability general liability with pollution coverage indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the insured carries a general liability policy with a pollution coverage endorsement

fields.label: Excess umbrella pollution liability separate pollution coverage indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the insured carries separate pollution coverage

fields.help: The gross sales or receipts amount

fields.help: The gross sales or receipts amount

fields.label: Excess umbrella protective liability independent contractor description
fields.help: The description of independent contractors.   ACORD 101, Additional Remarks Schedule, may be attached if more space is required

fields.label: Underlying policy general liability form edition date
fields.help: The edition date of the underlying general liability coverage form.  Policy coverage may vary depending on the edition date of the policy paper. The underlying general liability coverage forms issued by Insurances Services Office (ISO) vary if they are based on the rules of "86" or the rules of "88"

fields.label: Underlying policy general liability tail coverage effective date
fields.help: The effective date of the tail coverage.  The proposed retroactive date for the policy being applied for should not be earlier than the effective date of the tail coverage

fields.label: Vehicle combined single limit each accident amount
fields.help: The vehicle combined single limit liability each accident amount. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying automobile policy

fields.label: Vehicle bodily injury per accident limit amount
fields.help: The vehicle policy, bodily injury per accident limit amount. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying automobile policy

fields.label: Vehicle bodily injury per person limit amount
fields.help: The vehicle policy, bodily injury per person limit amount. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying automobile policy

fields.label: Vehicle property damage per accident limit amount
fields.help: The vehicle policy, property damage per accident limit amount. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying automobile policy

fields.label: General liability occurrence indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the general liability policy, occurrence basis applies. As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy

fields.label: General liability claims made indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the "claims made" option applies on the general liability policy. As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy

fields.label: General liability each occurrence limit amount
fields.help: The general liability, each occurrence limit amount. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy

fields.label: General liability general aggregate limit amount
fields.help: The general liability, general aggregate limit amount. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy

fields.label: General liability products and completed operations aggregate limit amount
fields.help: The general liability, products and completed operations aggregate limit amount. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy

fields.label: General liability personal and advertising injury limit amount
fields.help: The general liability, personal and advertising injury limit amount. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy

fields.label: General liability fire damage rented premises each occurrence limit amount
fields.help: The general liability, damage to rented premises each occurrence limit amount. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy

fields.label: General liability medical expense each person limit amount
fields.help: The general liability, medical expense each person limit amount. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy

fields.label: General liability claims made retroactive date
fields.help: The retroactive date if the policy was issued on a Claims Made basis and there was a retroactive date

fields.label: General liability claims made uninterrupted coverage entry date
fields.help: The retroactive date shown on the applicant's first Claims Made policy.  If this is the first such policy, the date will be the same as the proposed retroactive date shown on the preceding field. If this is a renewal, it is the effective date of the first policy issued in the sequence of uninterrupted Claims Made policies

fields.label: Workers compensation employers liability employers liability each accident limit amount
fields.help: The workers compensation and employers liability policy, employers liability each accident limit amount. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying employers liability policy

fields.label: Workers compensation employers liability employers liability disease each employee limit amount
fields.help: The workers compensation and employers liability policy, employers liability disease each employee limit amount. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying employers liability policy

fields.label: Workers compensation employers liability employers liability disease policy limit amount
fields.help: The workers compensation and employers liability policy, employers liability disease policy limit amount. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying employers liability policy

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business question acbyes indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates defense costs are within aggregate limits

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business question accyes indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates defense costs a separate limit?

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business question acdyes indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates defense costs are unlimited

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business question acecode
fields.help: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Has any product, work, accident, or location been excluded, uninsured or self insured from any previous coverage?"

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business any product work accidentlocation been excluded uninsured explanation
fields.help: An explanation as to whether any product, work, accident or location has been excluded, uninsured or self-insured from any previous coverage

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business question acfcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "For Claims made, was "tail" coverage purchased for any previous primary or excess policy?"

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business tail coverage purchased any previous primary or excess policy explanation
fields.help: An explanation as to whether tail coverage was purchased for any previous primary or excess policy

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business question aabcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Are services of an Advertising Agency used?"

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business services of advertising agency used explanation
fields.help: An explanation as to whether any services from an advertising agency have been used

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business question aaccode
fields.help: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Any coverage provided under agency's policy?"

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business any coverage provided under agency policy explanation
fields.help: An explanation as to whether any coverage has been provided under the agency's policy

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business question aadcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Does applicant own/lease/operate aircraft?"

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business applicant own lease operate aircraft explanation
fields.help: An explanation as to whether the applicant owns/leases or operates aircraft

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business question aaecode
fields.help: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Are explosives, caustics, flammables or other dangerous cargo hauled?"

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business explosives caustics flammables other dangerous cargo hauled explanation
fields.help: An explanation as to whether any explosives, caustics, flammable or other dangerous cargo is hauled

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business question aafcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Are passengers carried for a fee?"

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business passengers carried for fee explanation
fields.help: An explanation as to whether any passengers are carried for a fee

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business question aagcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Any units not insured by underlying policies?"

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business any units not insured underlying policies explanation
fields.help: An explanation as to whether any units are not insured by underlying policies

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business question aahcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Are any vehicles leased or rented to others?"

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business any vehicles leased rented others explanation
fields.help: An explanation as to whether any vehicles are leased or rented to others

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business question aaicode

fields.label: Commercial umbrella line of business question abfcode
